visual_description: (00:00-00:07) A man in a light blue shirt and a striped tie sits in a black office chair, his head bowed. He looks down with a somber and weary expression. He holds a crumpled, shiny blue and silver wrapper in his hands, examining it thoughtfully before looking up with a faint, melancholic smile. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a character who is troubled and introspective. His focus on the crumpled wrapper suggests it holds a significant, perhaps painful, memory.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A gentle, melancholic piano and string melody begins to play, setting a somber mood.)
